flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Palo Verde College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $12.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Palo Verde College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($560 → $728).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 15 pp at Palo Verde College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (14.3% vs 29.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Palo Verde College rose 252% between 2007 and 2010 (932 → 3.3k).
